content:
# Abandonment Time

**Summary**: The time until a well stops producing at an economic limit.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-kamal|Kamal, 2012]] compared the abandonment time for different well types and reservoir conditions.

## Scientific Context

- [[2012-kamal|Kamal, 2012]] Determines the operational lifespan and investment period.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2012-kamal|Kamal, 2012]] Simulated production time until abandonment criteria are met.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Abandonment time decreases as horizontal permeability increases from 0.1 md to 1 md. ([[2012-kamal|Kamal, 2012, p. 110]])
- [[2012-kamal|Kamal, 2012]] Varies based on Kh, h, and penetration ratio.
